channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Black sacks of rubbish: junction of Harrow Manorway and Lensbury Way., 18th July
item.description:
Bags are both sides of the road, with two in the gutter.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle, 18th July
item.description:
Untaxed vehicle outside number 24 milford close vehicle has been dumped at least 2 months had multiple PCNs also. I pay to park in my road and on a couple of occasions I have had to park in another road, if this vehicle can be removed it would free up an extra space for everyone
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milford Close, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Station road se 6, 18th July
item.description:
Parking attendants have to inspect every day place is not for 10 days parking disabled people need this parking can someone take seriously please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 222, Brownhill Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oil spillage from your Rubbush lorry on Friday 17th. The leakage stretched for about 100 yards, 18th July
item.description:
Oil stains from Your Rubbish Lorry.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Creswell Drive, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover in middle of road, 18th July
item.description:
Have noticed that since we have had the larger B12 bus using this route and lorries every time they go over this area my house shudders. I know many years ago the road was totally dug up and relaid as the weight of vehicles was causing damage to peoples property. If someone can visit sight to ensure that the roadway is not suffering from a problem, would be greatful. Better to be safe than something happens and causes problems for residents.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rushdene, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped broken furniture, 18th July
item.description:
This piece of broken, damaged furniture seems to have migrated from the driveway of 47 Forde Avenue onto now blocking the actual pavement. It’s giving off a bad smell and has flies coming out of it. Started off on the driveway of 47 a few weeks ago but has recently been moved to block the pavement the last few days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forde Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daily fly tipping corner of Comberton Rd, 18th July
item.description:
Current and daily fly tipping on the corner of Comberton Rd, inclu. food being left. Is a health hazard to children. Please could a sign be put up to say this is an offence. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 18th July
item.description:
The tenants of 60 Lullingstone Crescent have moved and left behind a works van. It is taxed until 1.2.27 and the MOT 1.11.26. They have been gone 2 weeks. Surely you would come back for a vehicle with these dates. Can Bromley Council investigate, we don’t want to look at this vehicle please.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Blythe Hill, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown, 18th July
item.description:
Very over grown has sharp pricks on it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Richmond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised road signs, 18th July
item.description:
The sign reference to mopeds/motorbikes has been graffitied out. Assume this isnt official

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 199, Tooley Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised road sign, 18th July
item.description:
Assume the roadworks sign should not be attached,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105, Enid Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped garden waste and litter, 18th July
item.description:
The mess in Hockenden Lane is getting worse. Loads of rubbish from London Road to past the bridge and a bag of garden waste chucked in the hedge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hockenden Lane, St Mary Cray, Swanley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car appears abandoned. Parked half on pavement., 18th July
item.description:
For at least 6 weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dios y poo bags at entrance to Hawkwood estate, 18th July
item.description:
Usual problem…. smelly dog poo bags dumped on the footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping front of property, 18th July
item.description:
Local residents continually leaving collection bags out days early - collection day along this row is Tuesday but bags can be seen left out 7 days a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping front of property, 18th July
item.description:
Local residents continually leaving collection bags out days early - collection day along this row is Tuesday but bags can be seen left out 7 days a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping front of property, 18th July
item.description:
Local residents continually leaving collection bags out days early - collection day along this row is Tuesday but bags can be seen left out 7 days a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights out in and around pedestrian subway, 18th July
item.description:
There are 6 lights not working within the pedestrian subway and 3 lights not working close to the mirror on the Siebert Road side of the subway. This has been repeatedly reported by email to TFL cutomer services over the last year. Conway workers turn up to look but don't fix the problem. This is unacceptable for an active travel route where women and girls have been targeted by a flasher. Please fix this urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackwall Tunnel Approach, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked a public path, 18th July
item.description:
The lady at 226 Southover has parked her car on a public path so wheelchair users,people with buggies have to go in the road where it is unsafe for them to be

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 270, Southover, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 18th July
item.description:
Can you come and collect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Potters Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
